steps.title: Use Desmos to fit the two jobs
steps.content: Treat labor hours $h$ as $x$ and total charge $f(h)$ as $y$. Enter the two table points as $x_1=[1,3]$ and $y_1=[140,250]$, then type $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=55$ and $b=85$, so the model is $f(h)=55h+85$.

steps.title: Match and verify the choice
steps.content: Choice B is exactly $f(h)=55h+85$. It also checks both rows: $f(1)=55+85=140$ and $f(3)=165+85=250$. That matches choice B — B is correct.

choices.explanation: • f(1) = 85 + 55 = 140 ✓, but f(3) = 255 + 55 = 310 ≠ 250. Does not fit both points. Eliminate A.
• f(1) = 55 + 85 = 140 ✓ and f(3) = 165 + 85 = 250 ✓. Both data points satisfied. That matches choice B — B is correct.
